decision.summary: Hold the resolved-style 69k No position and skip new entries; no playbook-compliant edge is available.
decision.rationale: The only open position, No on 'Will Bitcoin reach $69,000 on March 27?', is marked at 1.0 with positive PnL and no longer needs active risk management; under the take-profit exception it can be left to resolve naturally. Beecthor’s latest thesis remains primarily bearish: 65k is the decisive level, with 62.7k and 59k as downside focus if weakness resumes, while rebounds toward 67k-70k are only tactical possibilities unless structure is reclaimed. Binance spot is 66289.16, so the nearest bearish market, 66k dip Yes at 76.5%, is too close to target to offer clean value, and the next bearish strike, 65k dip Yes at 20%, is below the 45% minimum. The nearest upside market, 67k reach Yes at 51.5%, is not clearly aligned with the dominant bearish thesis.
